title: Flat Rate Pricing Option
description: Flat rate pricing for sponsorships, takeovers, and DOOH exclusive placements. A fixed total cost regardless of delivery volume. For duration-scaled pricing (rate × time units), use the `time` model instead. If fixed_price is present, it's fixed pricing. If absent, it's auction-based.

pricing_option_id.description: Unique identifier for this pricing option within the product

pricing_model.description: Fixed cost regardless of delivery volume

fixed_price.description: Flat rate cost. If present, this is fixed pricing. If absent, auction-based.

floor_price.description: Minimum acceptable bid for auction pricing (mutually exclusive with fixed_price). Bids below this value will be rejected.

price_guidance.description: Optional pricing guidance for auction-based bidding

parameters.title: DoohParameters
parameters.description: DOOH inventory allocation parameters. Sponsorship and takeover flat_rate options omit this field entirely — only include for digital out-of-home inventory.

type.description: Discriminator identifying this as DOOH parameters

sov_percentage.description: Guaranteed share of voice as a percentage (0-100)

loop_duration_seconds.description: Duration of the ad loop rotation in seconds

min_plays_per_hour.description: Minimum number of plays per hour guaranteed

venue_package.description: Named collection of screens included in this buy

duration_hours.description: Duration of the DOOH slot in hours (e.g., 24 for a full-day takeover)

daypart.description: Named daypart for this slot (e.g., morning_commute, evening_rush)

estimated_impressions.description: Estimated audience impressions for this slot (informational, not a delivery guarantee)

min_spend_per_package.description: Minimum spend requirement per package using this pricing option, in the specified currency

price_breakdown.description: Breakdown of how fixed_price was derived from the list (rate card) price. Only meaningful when fixed_price is present.

eligible_adjustments.description: Adjustment kinds applicable to this pricing option. Tells buyer agents which adjustments are available before negotiation. When absent, no adjustments are pre-declared — the buyer should check price_breakdown if present.
